notes: HKEX stock 0327. hkex_manual is now reproducible from git via the tracked TXT filing set SRC_001-SRC_006 (FY2022-FY2024 plus H1-2023/H1-2024/H1-2025); 3.0 was used only as reference inventory to recover those source texts, not as an extraction solution. H1 interim support is canonized from extractor-backed HKEX compact bilingual text parsing. HkexFetcher implemented (BL-083). HKFRS is IFRS-equivalent (applied by PwC-audited entity). All monetary fields in HK$'000. No interest-bearing borrowings (confirmed 2022-2025). Weighted-average basic shares from Note 12. D&A additive: PPE depreciation + ROU depreciation + intangible amortisation (Note 8).
